sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Exencial Wealth Advisors LLC Has $14.06 Million Holdings in Schwab Intermediate-Term U.S. Treasury ETF $SCHR
feed.summary: Exencial Wealth Advisors LLC increased its stake in Schwab Intermediate-Term U.S. Treasury ETF (SCHR) by 12.3% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to $14.06 million across 559,604 shares. Other hedge funds have also adjusted their positions in SCHR, with several acquiring new stakes. The ETF, which tracks investment-grade U.S. Treasury debt with 3-10 year maturities, opened at $25.10 and has seen various movements from institutional investors.

feed.title: Lakeland achieves NFPA 1970 certification for Firefighting Gloves
feed.summary: Lakeland Industries announced that its Ultimate Glow+ Leather Firefighting Gloves-NFPA 321 Series has officially achieved NFPA 1970:2025 certification, marking a significant advancement in firefighter protection. This milestone product is the first NFPA 1970:2025 certified item in Lakeland Fire + Safety's portfolio and is expected to be available soon. President and CEO Jim Jenkins highlighted the extensive engineering and testing involved, stating the glove sets a new benchmark for performance and protection and meets new restricted substances lists.

feed.title: eBay Expands Circular Fashion Fund Across Europe and North America
feed.summary: eBay is expanding its Circular Fashion Fund for its fourth year, now open to businesses and startups across the EU, Switzerland, and Canada, in addition to existing markets. Eight selected businesses will receive $50,000 in funding and mentorship, with one global winner eligible for an additional $300,000 investment from eBay Ventures. The program aims to support innovative solutions that reduce textile waste and promote circularity in the fashion industry, with eBay's total global commitment reaching $1.9 million by the end of 2026.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI Makes New Investment in Eos Energy Enterprises, Inc. $EOSE
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI has acquired a new stake of 239,098 shares in Eos Energy Enterprises (NASDAQ: EOSE), valued at approximately $2.72 million. This investment comes despite Eos Energy reporting a significant third-quarter earnings miss of ($2.77) EPS against an expected ($0.31) EPS. The company also saw notable insider selling during December, with directors selling over 800,000 shares worth about $12.26 million.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI Buys 9,200 Shares of Howmet Aerospace Inc. $HWM
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI significantly increased its stake in Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) by 377.5%, purchasing an additional 9,200 shares to bring its total holdings to 11,637 shares valued at $2.284 million. This move is part of broader institutional interest, with major investors like JPMorgan Chase and Norges Bank also holding substantial positions, accounting for 90.46% institutional ownership. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $223.35, following solid quarterly earnings and optimistic revenue guidance from Howmet Aerospace.

feed.title: Oklo Inc. $OKLO Shares Sold by Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI reduced its stake in Oklo Inc. (NYSE:OKLO) by 57.3% in Q3, selling nearly 30,000 shares, though institutional investors still collectively own about 85.03% of the company. The article notes significant insider selling, with the CEO and CFO recently offloading shares, resulting in insiders owning 18.9% of the company. Despite a Meta partnership improving long-term demand visibility, Oklo shares fell after an EPS miss and a negative outlook, with analysts holding an average "Hold" rating and a $102.13 price target.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI Acquires New Stake in Datadog, Inc. $DDOG
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI has acquired a new stake of 16,222 shares in Datadog, Inc. valued at approximately $2.31 million during the third quarter. Datadog reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, and provided positive FY2025 guidance. Despite significant insider selling from top executives, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a price target of $198.82.

feed.title: Top 10: CEOs in Food
feed.summary: This article ranks the top 10 CEOs in the food industry, highlighting their roles in large global brands like PepsiCo, Nestlé, and Unilever. It details their experience, leadership achievements, and the challenges they navigate in a transforming industry. The CEOs are evaluated based on their company's revenue and their impact on innovation, resilience, and responsible leadership.

feed.title: USA: EVgo plans nationwide fast-charging rollout at Kroger stores
feed.summary: EVgo is expanding its partnership with Kroger to install thousands of high-power fast-charging stations at Kroger grocery store locations across the US. The plan aims for at least 150 new fast-charging stalls annually through 2035, providing convenient charging options for EV drivers while they shop. The first site under this expanded agreement is already operational in Salt Lake City, Utah, with more planned across several states.

feed.title: Fastenal Co.: How a Quiet Industrial Powerhouse Became a Data-Driven Supply Chain Platform
feed.summary: Fastenal Co. has transformed from a fastener wholesaler into a sophisticated, data-driven supply chain platform. The company integrates local branches, on-site locations, IoT-enabled vending machines, and a digital portal to reduce procurement friction and line-down risks for manufacturers. This model, focusing on total cost of ownership rather than just product price, has allowed Fastenal to embed itself deeply within customer operations, creating significant switching costs and a stronger competitive edge against rivals like Grainger and Amazon Business.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM Shares Sold by Geneos Wealth Management Inc.
feed.summary: Geneos Wealth Management Inc. reduced its stake in JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) by 14.0% in the third quarter, now owning 71,579 shares worth approximately $22.6 million. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own about 71.55% of JPM stock. JPMorgan Chase recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.50 per share and reported Q4 adjusted earnings per share of $5.23, beating expectations, though overall profit was affected by a one-time Apple Card reserve charge and missed investment banking fee forecasts.

feed.title: Chevron, Exxon and BP in talks with Mexico for oil exploration deals
feed.summary: Chevron, Exxon Mobil, and BP are in discussions with the Mexican government and state oil company Pemex for potential oil exploration and extraction projects. These projects could collectively produce up to 200,000 barrels per day. The move reflects Mexico's strategy to boost its oil production through collaborations with international energy companies, with several Mexican firms also expressing interest in participating.

feed.title: Coca-Cola decides not to sell Costa Coffee
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has reportedly called off its plans to sell its Costa Coffee chain due to investor bids not meeting its expectations. The company had acquired the British coffee company in 2018 but it failed to live up to initial hopes amid increased competition and rising coffee prices. Coca-Cola may reconsider divesting Costa Coffee at a later stage.

feed.title: Company Profile – Thermo Fisher Scientific
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific is a global leader in serving science, aiming to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer. The company addresses the growing complexity and high costs of drug development and clinical research through its integrated "Accelerator Drug Development" model. This model combines CDMO and CRO services to streamline processes, reduce inefficiencies, and accelerate the delivery of new therapies to patients.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy: How 1.6x Leverage And Low Oil Prices Make It Overvalued
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG), the largest Permian Basin pure play, is considered overvalued due to elevated leverage of 1.5x–1.6x Net Debt/EBITDA and high EV/EBITDA multiples (7.2x–8.1x) compared to historical norms. The company’s decision to reduce its free cash flow distribution policy to 50% from 75%, coupled with a hedging strategy offering limited downside protection, contributes to a less attractive outlook. The author assigns a fair value of $120 per share, suggesting a nearly 20% downside.

feed.title: Bank of America, Citigroup And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
feed.summary: This article highlights several stocks to watch on Wednesday, including Bank of America (BAC) and Citigroup (C), which are expected to report quarterly earnings. TG Therapeutics (TGTX) released optimistic preliminary revenue estimates for 2026, while Gelteq (GELS) saw a significant jump after reporting positive preclinical trial results. Wells Fargo (WFC) is also anticipated to release its quarterly earnings.

feed.title: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC Sells 20,890 Shares of Packaging Corporation of America $PKG
feed.summary: Commonwealth Equity Services LLC reduced its stake in Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE:PKG) by 37.4% in the third quarter, selling 20,890 shares. Despite this, other major institutional investors like Vanguard, State Street, and Charles Schwab increased their positions, with American Century notably boosting its stake by 70.6%. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating from Wall Street analysts with a consensus target price of $236.17 and pays a quarterly dividend of $1.25.

feed.title: SLM Investors Have Opportunity to Lead SLM Corporation a/k/a Sallie Mae Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against SLM Corporation (Sallie Mae) for securities fraud, encouraging investors who purchased shares between July 25, 2025, and August 14, 2025, to join before February 17, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Sallie Mae made false and misleading statements regarding increased early-stage delinquencies and its loss mitigation capabilities for private education loans. Investors who suffered losses are advised to contact the firm to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Spectrum Brands (NYSE:SPB) Stock Crosses Above 200 Day Moving Average - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Spectrum Brands (NYSE:SPB) has crossed above its 200-day moving average, signaling potential bullish momentum, with shares trading around $63.88 against a $56.30 moving average. Analyst sentiment is moderately positive, holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $77. Despite a 5.2% revenue decline, the company reported a significant EPS beat and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.47, representing a 2.9% yield and a 47% payout ratio.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation $BAC Shares Sold by Capital City Trust Co. FL
feed.summary: Capital City Trust Co. FL reduced its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 51.6% in the third quarter, leaving them with 10,509 shares valued at $542,000. Despite this sell-off, analyst sentiment for BAC is generally positive, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a price target of $59.82, spurred by recent upgrades from firms like HSBC and Wells Fargo. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, while various positive news items and analyst reports support upside potential amidst some negative sentiment regarding potential credit card interest rate caps.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI Increases Stock Position in Visa Inc. $V
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group Inc. RI has increased its holdings in Visa Inc. by 15.0% in the third quarter, now owning 120,644 shares worth approximately $41.19 million. This increase comes despite recent insider selling by Visa's CEO and other executives, and amidst regulatory concerns regarding potential APR caps and swipe-fee legislation that could impact Visa's transaction volumes. Despite these headwinds, analysts currently rate Visa as a "Buy" with a consensus price target of $402.52, and the company recently raised its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: From Talon to Seraphic: How Israeli startups came to dominate browser security
feed.summary: Israeli startups have become a dominant force in browser security, driven by significant acquisitions and funding rounds. Companies like Talon, Seraphic, and Perception Point have been acquired by major cybersecurity firms, while independent players like Island and Guardio have achieved high valuations, showcasing the growing importance of browser-centric security as work shifts to SaaS applications and cloud-based tools. This trend highlights Israel's position as a key innovation hub in addressing the browser as a critical attack surface.

feed.title: AI-Powered Pizza Ordering Systems
feed.summary: Papa John's has introduced an AI-powered food ordering agent, developed with Google Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience, to enhance the customer ordering process. This omnichannel solution is accessible across various platforms, including mobile apps, websites, calls, kiosks, and in-car systems. The system features advanced voice and group ordering, an Intelligent Deal Wizard, and no-tap reordering capabilities, aiming to make digital interactions faster, smarter, and more seamless for customers.

feed.title: RWE sells 50% stake in British Norfolk offshore wind projects to KKR
feed.summary: RWE has agreed to sell a 50% stake in its Norfolk Vanguard West and East offshore wind projects in Britain to investor KKR. This move follows RWE's success in a British renewables auction and marks the beginning of a long-term partnership between the two companies for jointly developing and operating the wind farms. The deal, for which no financial details were disclosed, is expected to close in the summer and will support the billing for large offshore projects.

feed.title: Insurance moves: ISG and Markel
feed.summary: Insight Service Group (ISG) has appointed Seth Ingall, a veteran insurance executive from GEICO, to its board of directors, aiming to strengthen its claims and litigation support services through integrated, tech-enabled solutions. Meanwhile, Markel Insurance has named Preeti Gureja, formerly of Chubb and AIG, as its chief risk officer for US and Bermuda operations, tasking her with overseeing risk strategy and integrating data-driven insights into portfolio management. These appointments reflect both companies' efforts to enhance their capabilities in claims management and enterprise risk.

feed.title: Kennedy-Wilson (NYSE:KW) Shares Cross Above Two Hundred Day Moving Average - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Kennedy-Wilson (NYSE:KW) shares have crossed above their 200-day moving average, reaching $9.88, indicating short-term strength following a period where its 200-day moving average was $8.58. Despite this technical uptick, analysts maintain a "Sell" rating with a consensus price target of $10.00, citing a negative P/E ratio and high debt-to-equity. The company also offers a quarterly dividend with a high yield, but its negative payout ratio raises concerns about its sustainability.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley flags further upside for UK banks as new targets come into focus By Investing.com
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley believes UK banks still have significant upside potential, driven by strong earnings momentum and upcoming new return targets. The brokerage forecasts robust net interest income growth for 2026 and highlights Barclays and NatWest as key upside drivers based on their anticipated 2028 targets. Despite improved profitability, current valuations for UK domestic banks remain at the lower end of their historical range.

feed.title: Raymond James Upgrades FLEX Ltd (FLEX) to Outperform
feed.summary: Raymond James analyst Melissa Fairbanks upgraded FLEX Ltd (NASDAQ: FLEX) from Market Perform to Outperform. The article mentions a price target but does not disclose the figure, and the full content is premium-only.

feed.title: Calamos Wealth Management LLC Boosts Holdings in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Calamos Wealth Management LLC increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation by 9.1% during the third quarter, making it their 4th largest holding. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in Microsoft, which reportedly had strong quarterly earnings, exceeding analyst expectations. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $630.37, despite some expressing concerns about increasing AI data center costs and macroeconomic headwinds.

feed.title: 64,636 Shares in Innovative Solutions and Support, Inc. $ISSC Purchased by Benjamin Edwards Inc.
feed.summary: Benjamin Edwards Inc. recently acquired a new stake of 64,636 shares, valued at approximately $807,000, in Innovative Solutions and Support, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISSC) during the 3rd quarter. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in ISSC. The article also provides an overview of ISSC's stock performance, analyst ratings, and company profile, noting a consensus "Buy" rating and an average target price of $16.25.

feed.title: Canal Insurance CO Boosts Stake in AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Canal Insurance Co. significantly increased its stake in AT&T Inc. in Q3, purchasing an additional 50,100 shares to bring its total holdings to 220,000 shares valued at approximately $6.21 million. This makes AT&T its 27th largest holding, representing about 1.3% of its portfolio. AT&T also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share, yielding 4.8% annually, with analysts currently rating the stock a "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $29.35.

feed.title: Ondas Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:ONDS) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: Ondas Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:ONDS) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from eight analysts, with an average 1-year price target of $12.17, including a recent increase to $17 by Stifel. Despite missing Q3 EPS estimates, the company's revenue beat expectations. The stock faces significant insider selling, though institutional investors hold a substantial stake.

feed.title: Tesla, Inc. $TSLA Position Cut by Bristlecone Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Bristlecone Advisors LLC has reduced its holdings in Tesla by 5.3% in the third quarter, selling 1,215 shares and now owning 21,823 shares valued at $9.705 million. This comes amidst other institutional investors either increasing or decreasing their stakes, with overall institutional ownership at 66.20%. Meanwhile, Tesla insiders, including CFO Vaibhav Taneja and Director Kimbal Musk, have also sold shares, totaling 119,457 shares worth $53.5 million over the past ninety days.

feed.title: ARE Investors Have Opportunity to Join Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Fraud Investigation with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced an investigation into Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) on behalf of investors. This follows Alexandria's Q3 2025 financial results, which reported declining revenues, failing to meet analyst expectations, and a significant drop in adjusted funds from operations, leading to a nearly 19.2% share price decline. The firm is investigating potential violations of securities laws and encourages affected shareholders to participate in the claims.

feed.title: What Live Nation Entertainment (LYV)'s Earnings Beat but Revenue Miss Means For Shareholders
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) recently reported quarterly results where adjusted operating income surpassed analyst estimates, but revenue and event volume fell short. This mixed performance has led to varied analyst reactions, with some maintaining positive outlooks due to strong live event demand, while others downgraded the stock citing concerns about Ticketmaster. The article highlights that despite a share price pullback, Live Nation's core investment narrative, centered on global expansion and managing regulatory pressure on Ticketmaster, remains largely unchanged in the near term.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Equifax (EFX) Profitability Strains And Shifting Credit‑Scoring Economics
feed.summary: Equifax (EFX) is facing investor concerns due to reduced analyst outlooks and a major institutional investor exiting its position, driven by weakening profitability metrics and shifts in the credit-scoring ecosystem. The company's future projections show substantial revenue and earnings growth, but some investors express caution given competitive pressures and uncertainties in how credit economics will be shared. Simply Wall St provides further analysis, highlighting diverse fair value estimates and stressing the importance of evaluating profitability alongside growth prospects.

feed.title: Assessing Camden Property Trust (CPT) Valuation After Mixed Recent Returns And Premium P/E Multiple
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (CPT) is currently trading at US$107.60, with a valuation narrative suggesting it's 7.3% undervalued, reaching a fair value of US$116.07 due to strong apartment demand and improving affordability. However, this optimistic outlook is contrasted by a high P/E ratio of 42.6x, significantly above the industry average and its own fair ratio, raising questions about whether the market has already priced in future growth or if this presents a valuation risk. Investors are encouraged to consider both the growth narrative and the premium multiple in their assessment.

feed.title: Dime Community Bancshares to Release Earnings on January 21, 2026
feed.summary: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. announced it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings on January 21, 2026, before the U.S. equity markets open. The company will also host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day, featuring CEO Stuart Lubow to discuss financial performance, followed by a Q&A session. A replay of the call and webcast will be available for 12 months.

feed.title: Klarna app now lets Europeans send instant cash across 13 nations
feed.summary: Klarna has launched instant peer-to-peer (P2P) payments in 13 European countries, enhancing its digital bank offering. This new feature allows users to send money to friends and family directly from the Klarna app, aiming to provide a simpler, cheaper alternative to traditional banking. The company plans to expand this service to non-Klarna customers and cross-border payments soon, further integrating P2P into its everyday banking solutions.

feed.title: Tesla driver-assist system FSD will switch to subscription-only — Musk
feed.summary: Tesla will transition its Full Self-Driving (FSD) driver-assistance system to a subscription-only model, as announced by CEO Elon Musk. This change, effective after February 14, eliminates the significant upfront purchase cost, with subscriptions already available for US$99 a month. The move comes as Tesla faces a sales slump and focuses more on its tech initiatives.

feed.title: Bangor Savings Bank Has $30,000 Stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC $STX
feed.summary: Bangor Savings Bank significantly reduced its stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC by 98.4% in the third quarter, ending with 125 shares valued at $30,000. Despite this reduction and recent insider selling totaling over $36 million, Seagate is seeing positive developments. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus and raised price targets, citing the company's new 32TB drives addressing growing AI demand and its increased quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Materion stock rating upgraded by KeyBanc to Overweight on growth outlook
feed.summary: KeyBanc has upgraded Materion Corp. (NYSE:MTRN) stock rating from Sector Weight to Overweight, setting a price target of $161.00, representing a 15% upside potential. This upgrade is driven by KeyBanc's outlook on strengthening global semiconductor supply chains, broadening demand cycles, potential increases in defense budgets, and Materion's expanding clean energy business. The firm projects an EPS growth of 15-20% CAGR over the next two years, believing the company's growth and margin enhancement strategies will attract cyclical growth investors.

feed.title: Baron Wealth Management LLC Has $9.11 Million Holdings in Apple Inc. $AAPL
feed.summary: Baron Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) during Q3, now holding 35,779 shares valued at $9.11 million, making it their fifth-largest holding. Apple reported strong quarterly results with EPS of $1.85 and revenue of $102.47 billion, surpassing analyst expectations. Strategic catalysts include a multi-year deal with Google for Gemini AI and the launch of Apple Creator Studio, both expected to boost AI capabilities and services revenue, driving bullish outlooks for 2026 despite some concerns about AI spending relative to peers.

feed.title: Benjamin Edwards Inc. Sells 8,184 Shares of Public Storage $PSA
feed.summary: Benjamin Edwards Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) during the third quarter, selling 8,184 shares to hold 3,243 shares valued at approximately $937,000. Despite this sell-off, Public Storage holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $315.47, although individual targets vary. The company offers a quarterly dividend of $3.00, yielding about 4.3%, but its high payout ratio of 124.61% raises concerns about dividend sustainability.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Ditches Costa Coffee Sale As Bids Falter: Report
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has reportedly halted the sale of its Costa Coffee chain because private equity bids did not meet the company's expectations, targeting around $2.5 billion. The decision comes as Costa faces stiff competition, rising costs, and struggles with profitability, leading to a potential write-down in its value on Coca-Cola's books. Despite the current halt, Coca-Cola might revisit the sale in the medium term.

feed.title: 3GW North Sea wind plan aims to power 3M UK homes with clean energy
feed.summary: KKR and RWE have formed a 50:50 joint venture to develop two offshore wind farms, Norfolk Vanguard East and Norfolk Vanguard West, in the UK's North Sea. The projects, requiring over $15 billion in investment, will have a combined capacity of approximately 3GW and are expected to power over 3 million UK homes with clean energy. This partnership aims to support the UK's decarbonization goals and contribute significantly to its offshore wind capacity targets.

feed.title: HPE (Hewlett-Packard Enterprise) is a key partner in helping South Korea realize Sovereign Artifici..
feed.summary: HPE Korea CEO Kim Young-chae highlighted the company's role as a key partner in South Korea's pursuit of Sovereign AI, emphasizing HPE's comprehensive infrastructure and integrated solutions for AI development. He noted HPE's ability to simplify AI adoption for domestic companies and collaborate with giants like Nvidia and AMD to advance AI technology. HPE is also solidifying its position in national AI infrastructure in Korea, demonstrated by its contributions to supercomputing projects at KISTI and collaborations with the Ministry of Science and ICT.

feed.title: Prudential Picks Former HSBC Veteran Douglas Flint as Next Board Chair
feed.summary: Prudential has appointed Douglas Flint, a former HSBC veteran, as its next board chair, succeeding Shriti Vadera after the London-based insurer's annual general meeting in May. Flint will join the board in March as a nonexecutive director and chair-designate to ensure a smooth transition. He brings extensive experience from his more than two decades at HSBC, where he served as group chair until 2017.

feed.title: Coca-Cola reportedly pulls plug on Costa Coffee sale
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has reportedly halted plans to sell its Costa Coffee chain after private equity bidders failed to meet financial expectations. The decision comes as CEO Henrique Braun prepares to take over in March, with the company potentially revisiting a sale at a later date. Costa Coffee has been underperforming, recording a significant operating loss in 2024, attributed to weak high street footfall and increased competition.

feed.title: Northern Trust Secures Expanded Mandate with Swedish Pension Provider AMF Tjänstepension AB
feed.summary: Northern Trust has expanded its mandate with AMF Tjänstepension AB, a leading Swedish pension provider, to include investment operations for trade services across AMF's total portfolio, in addition to continuing global custody services. This renewed agreement builds on a more than 20-year partnership and highlights Northern Trust's commitment to innovation and support for its clients' evolving needs in the Nordic region. AMF cited Northern Trust's expertise, infrastructure, and technology-enabled operating model as key factors in their decision, expecting enhanced efficiency and oversight.
